title: The AI Productivity Playbook
subtitle: 50 Ways to Save 10 Hours a Week Using Free AI Tools
author: A. Zhou
categories: Computers & Technology > Computer Science > AI & Machine Learning
description:
Stop wasting 10 hours a week on tasks AI can handle in minutes.

The AI Productivity Playbook gives you 50 copy-paste techniques to immediately save time on emails, meetings, research, content creation, and operations — using free AI tools you already have access to.

No theory. No hype. Just practical techniques with real prompts you can use TODAY.

✅ Draft emails in 10 seconds instead of 10 minutes
✅ Summarize 40-page reports in 5 bullet points
✅ Create a week of social media content in 30 minutes
✅ Automate repetitive workflows without coding
✅ Make better decisions with AI-powered analysis

Each technique includes the exact prompt to use, which free tool to use, and how much time you'll save per week.

Whether you're a professional, freelancer, or business owner — this book pays for itself in the first hour of reading.
notes: Need to expand from 4,500 to 25,000 words. Core structure and 25/50 hacks are fully written. Remaining sections need fleshing out with more examples, case studies, and expanded prompt templates.
